name: Adventure Time
description: Pendleton Ward's post-apocalyptic fantasy animated series set in the Land of Ooo

questions.q: Who created Adventure Time?

source.notes: CalArts graduate; also voices Lumpy Space Princess.

questions.q: On which network did Adventure Time originally air?

source.notes: Premiered April 5, 2010.

questions.q: What species is Finn, the main character of Adventure Time?

source.notes: Known as Finn the Human — humans are rare in the Land of Ooo.

questions.q: What is the name of Finn's stretchy, shape-shifting dog best friend?

source.notes: Can stretch, shrink, and morph at will.

questions.q: What is the name of the sentient game console who lives with Finn and Jake?

source.notes: Full name Beemo; voiced by Niki Yang.

questions.q: Which thousand-year-old rock-music-loving vampire is one of the series' main characters?

source.notes: Voiced and sung by Olivia Olson.

questions.q: Who rules the Candy Kingdom as its pink-haired leader?

source.notes: Real name Bonnibel; a scientist-ruler made of bubblegum.

questions.q: In what year did Adventure Time premiere on Cartoon Network?

source.notes: Ran until September 3, 2018.

questions.q: The Land of Ooo is set in what kind of post-catastrophic world?

source.notes: A nuclear war that ended human civilization; show is set ~1000 years later.

questions.q: What is the Ice King's real name, from before his corruption by the crown?

source.notes: Revealed in the Season 2 episode 'Holly Jolly Secrets'.

questions.q: Who voices Finn the Human across the entire series?

source.notes: Was 12 when the pilot was recorded; voice matured naturally on-screen.

questions.q: Who provides the gravelly voice of Jake the Dog?

source.notes: Also voices Bender on Futurama.

questions.q: What is Princess Bubblegum's full first name?

source.notes: Often called 'PB' or 'Bonnie' by Marceline.

questions.q: How many seasons did Adventure Time run in its original series?

source.notes: 283 episodes total.

questions.q: Who voices Marceline the Vampire Queen and performs her songs?

source.notes: Daughter of musician Martin Olson.

questions.q: Which major kids' network originally rejected Adventure Time's pilot before Cartoon Network picked it up?

source.notes: The pilot premiered on Nicktoons Network before Cartoon Network picked up the series.

questions.q: What is the title of the Adventure Time series finale that aired in September 2018?

source.notes: Also the title of the series' ending theme song.

questions.q: Which 2015 miniseries focuses on Marceline's origins and her conflict with her vampire past?

source.notes: An eight-episode miniseries in Season 7.

questions.q: Who took over as Adventure Time showrunner from Pendleton Ward starting in Season 5?

source.notes: Ward said directing people exhausted him; he stayed on as a writer/voice actor.

questions.q: Which future Cartoon Network showrunner worked as a storyboard artist on Adventure Time before creating her own series?

source.notes: Went on to create Steven Universe in 2013.

questions.q: Which 2020-2021 HBO Max spin-off consists of four hour-long specials?

source.notes: Episodes: BMO, Obsidian, Together Again, Wizard City.

questions.q: Which band performs the series' closing theme 'Island Song (Come Along With Me)'?

source.notes: Indie band from Olympia, WA; Ashley Eriksson sings lead.
